context.usage: Echo stands on perch; rendered behind the character layer.

shape_notes: Main log is 72x4px with 1px outline (#1D2B53) and fill (#AB5236).
Add 3-5 1px notches using #1D2B53; do not use dithering.

acceptance_criteria: Perch asset bounding box is exactly 72x8px.
Top surface is a straight horizontal line so Echo feet can align to a 1px baseline.
Texture pixels are limited to 5 or fewer to keep PICO-8 simplicity.
shared_properties: Asset preserves the front-facing 128x128 cage composition.
Core palette fields stay fixed at primary #1D2B53, background #FFF1E8, and accent #FF004D.
Flat pixel rendering keeps the room calm and readable behind gameplay.
differences: This layer anchors Echo to a stable perch line in the center band of the scene.
The perch width supports the 40x40 character footprint without crowding.
Static rendering keeps the standing pose readable across all character states.
